critic_raw:
Verdict — recommendation system evaluation:

Recall@50 lift of 17% is a strong component-level result. The evaluation is appropriate for the component but not sufficient for the migration decision. The three issues — upstream proxy metric, offline-online gap, and downstream survival analysis — make the offline result an unreliable predictor of watch-time improvement.

Verdict: critique_wins
adjudication_raw: Baseline run 3. All three must-find issues. Verdict: critique_wins.
